query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, service, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, service, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'service') AS service, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, service, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, service ORDER BY time

SELECT time, entrypoint, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, entrypoint, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'entrypoint') AS entrypoint, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_entrypoint_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_entrypoint_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, entrypoint, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, entrypoint ORDER BY time

SELECT time, code, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, code, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'code') AS code, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, code, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, code ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_open_connections' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_open_connections' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, service, round(quant,6) AS value FROM (SELECT time, service, arraySort(x -> x.1, groupArray((le_f, c))) AS pairs, arrayMap(x -> x.1, pairs) AS les, arrayMap(x -> x.2, pairs) AS cum, cum[length(cum)] AS total, 0.99 * total AS rnk, arrayFirstIndex(y -> y >= rnk, cum) AS idx, multiIf(total=0,0, idx<=1,les[1], idx>=length(les),les[length(les)-1], les[idx-1] + (les[idx]-les[idx-1])*(rnk-cum[idx-1])/(cum[idx]-cum[idx-1])) AS quant FROM (SELECT time, service, le_f, sum(r) AS c FROM (SELECT time, fp, service, le_f, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp, le_f ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'service') AS service, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, if(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le')='+Inf', 1e18, toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le'))) AS le_f, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_request_duration_seconds.bucket' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_service_request_duration_seconds.bucket' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, service, cluster, le_f) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, service, le_f) GROUP BY time, service) WHERE total > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, service, round(quant,6) AS value FROM (SELECT time, service, arraySort(x -> x.1, groupArray((le_f, c))) AS pairs, arrayMap(x -> x.1, pairs) AS les, arrayMap(x -> x.2, pairs) AS cum, cum[length(cum)] AS total, 0.50 * total AS rnk, arrayFirstIndex(y -> y >= rnk, cum) AS idx, multiIf(total=0,0, idx<=1,les[1], idx>=length(les),les[length(les)-1], les[idx-1] + (les[idx]-les[idx-1])*(rnk-cum[idx-1])/(cum[idx]-cum[idx-1])) AS quant FROM (SELECT time, service, le_f, sum(r) AS c FROM (SELECT time, fp, service, le_f, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp, le_f ORDER BY time), 0) AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'service') AS service, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, if(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le')='+Inf', 1e18, toFloat64OrZero(JSONExtractString(t.labels,'le'))) AS le_f, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_request_duration_seconds.bucket' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_service_request_duration_seconds.bucket' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, service, cluster, le_f) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote})) GROUP BY time, service, le_f) GROUP BY time, service) WHERE total > 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_config_reloads_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_config_reloads_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='traefik_service_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
